label: default agent • delete a local model by id
query: Delete the local model mlx-community/Old-Unused-Model-7B-4bit to free up disk space.
notes: action 'delete' for a local model. The model is not installed in the isolated store, so the tool returns a typed not-found error (no deletion); the assertion pins the ACTION (delete, not cancel/download) because that is the discrimination under test. It does NOT pin the identifier field: osaurus_model accepts either `id` or `repo_id` for delete (they identify the same model), and a model may use either — pinning one field would flip this case on the model's nondeterministic field choice.
